channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

1. Joe Rogan Blames Israel For Iran War — Days After Trump Visit  Forbes

  3. Joe Rogan Slams Trump’s Iran War After Chummy White House Visit: ‘How Do You Get Out of This?’  Mediaite
  4. 'That's nuts': Joe Rogan warns people will 'light NYC on fire' if Trump tries 3rd term bid  rawstory.com
  5. Rogan again slams US war with Iran: ‘All of it’s terrifying’  Yahoo

item.title: Fighter Jets Collide After Distracted Pilots Whip Out Their Phones - The Daily Beast
item.description:
1. Fighter Jets Collide After Distracted Pilots Whip Out Their Phones  The Daily Beast
  2. Pilot’s selfie led to mid-air collision in F-15K fighter jet, says South Korea’s air force  The Guardian
  3. South Korean fighter jets collided due to pilots taking pictures, report finds  BBC
  4. 2021 collision of South Korean warplanes caused by pilots taking video, report says  ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos
  5. Pilot’s mid-flight selfie blamed for South Korean fighter jet collision  The Independent

item.title: A catastrophic climate event is upon us. Here is why you’ve heard so little about it | George Monbiot - The Guardian
item.description:
1. A catastrophic climate event is upon us. Here is why you’ve heard so little about it | George Monbiot  The Guardian
  2. 2 studies warn 'Day After Tomorrow' ocean current is in trouble  USA Today
  3. A vital system of Atlantic Ocean currents is weakening and closer to collapse than thought, new studies find  CNN
  4. Crucial Atlantic current closer to collapse than we thought — leading to global catastrophe: ‘Need to prepare now’  New York Post
  5. Democrats May Believe Climate Change Is Real. They Don’t Act Like It.  The New Republic
